Headline:
The Most Seamless Warranty Management Software

Subtitle:
Warranty registration, claims management, and tracking unified in one system. Reduce the cost of every claim, manage warranties with more control, and make the warranty lifecycle a new revenue channel.

si.t: All-in-One Warranty Management System. Seamless for Your Team. Effortless for Your Customers.

Registration, claims, service, protection plans, and analytics no longer need separate tools. Dyrect connects the full warranty lifecycle, from registration to claim resolution and every service record in between.

si.t: The Only Warranty Management System Built for the Full Post-Sale Journey
Most warranty tools solve one part of the problem. Dyrect covers the entire journey, from the moment a product is registered to the day a claim is resolved and every service interaction in between.

r.t: Every section will have a tab with miltiple features Ref -
https://emeraldkit.webflow.io/
EXTENDED WARRANTIES
Offer Protection Plans Across More Buying Touchpoints. Keep 100% of Revenue In-House

Don't leave extended warranty revenue to third parties. Dyrect lets brands sell protection plans and extended coverage directly, at the moment customers are most likely to buy, right on the product page or after purchase.
– Multi-Touchpoint Offers: Place protection plan offers on the product page, at checkout, and after purchase – Native Ecommerce Integration: Connect natively with Shopify and other ecommerce platforms – Self-Serve Plan Management: Let customers activate, view, and renew plans through a self-serve portal
- Sell Extended Warranty inhouse (ref -
myumbrella.ai

si.t: - Self Service Claims Portal - Tickets Tracking - Repair/ Replacements - Shipments - Payments

r.t: Omnichannel Product Registration & Upsell
Turn Every Buyer Into a Reachable Customer

Stop losing customers to marketplaces and offline retail. Dyrect collects first-party data at the point of registration so every buyer becomes a direct contact the team can reach, retain, and sell to again.
- Omnichannel Registration: Omnichannel product registration through QR code, website, and automatic registration for Shopify orders
- Digital Warranty: Digital warranty card and self-serve customer portal - Post-Registration Upsells: Trigger upsell offers at the exact moment a customer completes registration
Create Omnichannel Registration >
CLAIMS AND SERVICE MANAGEMENT
Every Claim Logged, Assigned, and Resolved With Full Visibility

Claims arrive from every direction and service work expands with every unresolved request. Dyrect organizes claim intake, validation, assignment, and resolution so teams can handle service requests with clear ownership and complete visibility.
– Serial Number Validation: Serial number validation catches fraudulent and duplicate claims before they are processed – Smart Ticket Routing: Automatic ticket assignment with priority levels and real-time status tracking – Service Workflow Tracking: Repair, replacement, shipment, dealer payment, and OEM chargeback tracking in one workflow
Streamline your Claims Process >
INSIGHTS AND ANALYTICS
Complete Picture of Your Warranty Operation in One Dashboard

Know exactly where claims are coming from, which products fail most, how fast the team resolves tickets, and where revenue opportunities are being missed. All in one dashboard, updated in real time.
– Warranty Performance Metrics: Track registration rates, claim volumes, and resolution times across every product – Defect Trend Detection: Identify high-defect products before they become a cost problem – Revenue Opportunity Insights: Spot upsell opportunities based on warranty expiry and customer activity
Explore Analytics >

si.t: Whoever Owns the Post-Sale Problem, Dyrect Solves It.

No first-party data. Slow claims processing. After-sales service that costs more than it earns. These are not separate problems, they are the same broken post-sale operation hitting three different teams. Dyrect's warranty management software fixes the whole thing.

si.t: You Have Thousands of Buyers You Cannot Reach
Your Claims Process Was Not Built to Scale
Your After-Sales Operation Costs Money and Earns None

Every product sold through Amazon, offline retail, or a distributor is a customer your brand has no record of. No email, no phone number, no purchase history. Dyrect captures first-party data at the point of product registration so every buyer becomes a direct contact you own, regardless of where they purchased.

Claims come in through email, WhatsApp, and phone calls. Each one gets logged manually, followed up individually, and resolved slowly. Dyrect replaces that with a structured system where every claim is validated against a serial number, assigned to the right person, tracked in real time, and closed without manual chasing.

Every warranty claim your team resolves is an expense with no return. Dyrect turns each service interaction into a revenue touchpoint by surfacing extended warranty plans and upsell offers at the right moment, so the same operation that was draining margin starts generating it.
Everything You Need to Run Warranty Operations, Built In
No add-ons, no third-party tools stitched together. Every feature needed to run a complete warranty operation comes built into Dyrect.
Replace paper cards with digital warranty records linked to the product and purchase details.
Check product authenticity and warranty eligibility before service activity moves ahead.
Set up registration fields, claim forms, and warranty rules for different products and categories.
Give buyers a clear place to view product details, warranty status, and service activity.
The registration page, warranty portal, and customer communications all carry the brand's logo, colors, and tone. Customers interact with the brand, not a third-party tool.
Keep claim ownership, notes, assignments, and service actions organized across internal teams.
Already on Shopify? Go Live in <30 Minutes. Dyrect is rated 5★ on the Shopify App Store. Three steps and your entire warranty operation is running automatically, no developer needed.
Step 1 — Install the App Find Dyrect on the Shopify App Store and install with a single click. No coding, no technical setup, no back and forth with a developer.
Step 2 — Sync Your Products Select which products need warranty registration. Dyrect pulls directly from your Shopify catalog and syncs automatically.
Step 3 — Go Live That's it. From the next fulfilled order, warranties are registered automatically and customers are notified without any manual work from your team.
Seamlessly Connect With Your Existing Tools

r.t: Dyrect Plugs Into the Tools Your Team Already Uses

No ripping and replacing your existing stack. Dyrect's warranty management system connects with your ecommerce store, marketing tools, and support platform so data flows automatically where it needs to go.
View Dyrect Integrations >

Ready to Optimize Your Post-Sale Operation?

si.t: resources section -- case study, newsletter, blogs, warranty pages

r.t: Frequently Asked Questions
1. What is Dyrect warranty management software used for?

Dyrect is a warranty management platform that helps brands handle product registration, warranty claims, service requests, and warranty tracking in one system. Teams can manage the full warranty lifecycle from customer registration through claim resolution. This helps founders and warranty teams reduce manual work while maintaining a clear record of registrations, claims, and service activity.
2. Can Dyrect work with Shopify stores?

Yes. Dyrect works with Shopify and can connect with your store to manage product warranty registration and warranty claims linked to Shopify orders. Once the app is installed, products can be synced from your Shopify catalog and warranty registration flows can run automatically for eligible orders.
3. How does product warranty registration work in Dyrect?

Dyrect allows customers to register their products through a branded registration page or portal. Registration can happen through a website link or QR code on packaging. During registration, the system collects key customer information such as email, phone number, purchase channel, and location. This helps brands capture first party customer data and maintain a proper warranty database.
4. Can Dyrect help manage warranty claims and service requests?

Yes. Dyrect supports warranty claim management through a structured workflow. Claims submitted by customers can be validated using serial numbers and then assigned to the right team member. Warranty teams can track claim status, manage repairs or replacements, and monitor every service interaction in one place.
5. Does Dyrect support serial number warranty tracking?

Yes. Dyrect supports serial number based warranty tracking. Each product can be linked to a serial number or unique identifier so the system can verify warranty eligibility during registration and claims. This helps prevent duplicate claims and improves accuracy in warranty service management.
6. Can brands sell extended warranties using Dyrect?

Yes. Dyrect can support extended warranty and protection plan offers. Brands can present extended warranty options during the product registration flow or at other post purchase touchpoints. This helps teams create additional revenue opportunities through warranty upsell programs while maintaining control over the customer relationship.
7. What integrations does Dyrect support?

Dyrect can integrate with several tools commonly used by ecommerce and support teams. This includes platforms such as Shopify, Zendesk, Zoho Desk, Mailchimp, and Klaviyo. These integrations allow warranty data, customer details, and service activity to sync with existing support and marketing systems.
8. What kind of businesses usually use Dyrect warranty software?

Dyrect is commonly used by ecommerce brands, manufacturers, consumer electronics brands, appliance companies, and businesses that sell physical products with warranties. It helps founders, operations leaders, warranty managers, and support teams manage warranty registration, claims processing, and post purchase customer service more efficiently.
9. Does Dyrect support warranty management for brands with dealer and OEM networks?

Yes. Dyrect handles chargeback management from dealers and OEMs directly within the platform. Brands can track which claims originated from which channel and streamline the reimbursement process without manual reconciliation.
10. What plans does Dyrect offer?

Dyrect offers flexible plans based on the features required, integration needs, and the scale of the warranty operation. Pricing can vary depending on registration volume, claims management workflows, and integration requirements. To learn more about plans or see how Dyrect fits your workflow, you can contact the Dyrect team or schedule a demo
